scenario.name: Grandstream VQ PUBLISH
scenario.send:
PUBLISH sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport][local_ip_type] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: collector <sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 PUBLISH Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Event: vq-rtcpxr Content-Type: application/vq-rtcpxr User-Agent: Grandstream GXP2160 1.0.9.50 Content-Length: [len]
VQSessionReport: CallTerm CallID: [call_id]@[local_ip] LocalID: sip:user1@[local_ip] RemoteID: sip:user2@[remote_ip] NLR=0.30 JDR=0.80 BLD=0.10 GLD=0.05 RTD=22.1 ESD=11.5 IAJ=2.3 MAJ=1.1 MOSLQ=4.3 MOSCQ=4.0 RLQ=90.0 RCQ=85.0 RERL=50.0
